category_sources: Official README says Netfetch scans Kubernetes clusters for pods not targeted by network policies.
source_facts.description: K8s tool to scan clusters for network policies and unprotected workloads.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Netfetch.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best documentation surface found in supplied input and official sources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/deggja/netfetch; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README topics include kubernetes, cli, network, policy, and cilium.
source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes network policy scanning and unprotected workload detection.
